name: Ostrich Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the spices and Worcestershire sauce over both sides of the steaks.
2. Heat a grill to high temperature and place the steaks on the rack.
3. Allow the steaks to sear for long enough to develop attractive grill marks.
4. Turn each steak 90 degrees to create diamond-shaped markings.
5. Continue cooking until the juices run clear or the internal temperature reaches 150°F (medium doneness).
